# Sales Tax Calculator HQ

> Free sales tax calculator at salestaxcalculatorhq.com with July 2026 rates for all 50 states and DC. Adds tax to a price or works backwards from a tax-included total, with state and average local rates built in. No sign-up, private, free.

Key facts:
- Rates current as of July 2026: state rates plus average local rates for every state and DC, including the five no-sales-tax states.
- Works forwards (price plus tax) and backwards (extract tax from a total), with a dedicated page per state.
- All math runs in the browser; nothing is uploaded or stored.

## Main pages

- [Sales Tax Calculator](https://salestaxcalculatorhq.com/): The add-tax and reverse-tax tool for every state.
- [US Sales Tax Explained](https://salestaxcalculatorhq.com/guide): State vs local rates, highest and lowest states, the five no-tax states, and reverse tax math, for 2026.
- [Sales Tax Rates by State](https://salestaxcalculatorhq.com/sales-tax-by-state): Full July 2026 table of state and average local rates for all 50 states and DC, with the no-tax states and the highest and lowest combined rates.
- [Sales Tax FAQ](https://salestaxcalculatorhq.com/faq): Common questions answered, including no-tax states, reverse tax math, local rates, online orders, and the highest and lowest states.
- [About](https://salestaxcalculatorhq.com/about): What the tool does and the privacy approach.
